message:
fix(combinator): harden map_reduce edge cases and apply formatting

map_reduce.rs:
- Fix all_succeeded() to return false for empty input (zero tasks),
  preventing vacuous truth that confused callers expecting `reduced`
  to be Some when this returns true. The previous behavior matched
  AggregateDecision::AllOk which is vacuously true for zero tasks,
  but callers relied on all_succeeded() implying a non-empty result.
- Remove unnecessary sort of successes vec: outcomes are already
  iterated sequentially with enumerate(), so successes are inherently
  in input order. The sort was a no-op adding O(n log n) overhead.
- Replace HashSet with BTreeSet for success_indices in
  map_reduce_to_result to get deterministic iteration order, which
  matters for the first-error-index scan correctness guarantee.

hedge.rs:
- Reformat hedge_outcomes test call to fit single line (rustfmt).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
